title: The Joy City
venue: Xidan Joy City — Digital Art Night at Joy City
description: A curated digital-art night by HUG and Neal Digital Gallery introducing a collection of auspicious red artworks to Beijing in celebration of the new year — Faavidel's piece The Shelter shown on the venue's LED facade.

title: AIA NFT Cryptoart Exposition
description: International NFT exposition of artists selected by the AIA Association, with Faavidel's Each Butterfly, A Star displayed on a kiosk screen alongside dozens of other selected digital works.

title: Renaissance — Salon International Coquelicot
description: Third edition of the Salon International Coquelicot bringing physical, digital and NFT works together — Faavidel exhibited as part of the AIA-curated international roster in the gallery's mixed-media show.

title: GM Istanbul — Blouny
description: The GM Istanbul edition of the Blouny exhibition series, presenting curated digital pieces in the Sanat Karakoy space — Faavidel's Petrichor projected on the gallery wall.

title: NFT.NYC 2024 Community Artist Showcase
venue: Rooftop Artists Village, North Javits, Hudson Yards
description: Selected from nearly 3,500 applicants for the NFT.NYC 2024 Community Artist Showcase, Faavidel's animated Petrichor piece played on the rooftop Artists Village gallery screens during the conference.

title: One Love NYC Art Exhibition
venue: The Canvas 3.0, Oculus World Trade Center
description: An evening showcase at The Canvas 3.0 inside the Oculus, where curated digital works — including Faavidel's — were shown across a triptych of vertical screens during the One Love NYC opening.

title: Blue Planet Grassroots Global Art Event
description: A digital exhibition exploring cultural significance, environmental importance and personal relationships with Earth's water sources — Faavidel was among the artists curated by HUG for the Blue Planet open call out of Dubai.

title: FCancer x St. Jude Charity Auction
description: Open-call charity auction reviewed by Christie's to benefit St. Jude Children's Research Hospital — Faavidel donated a piece for review and online auction in support of the cause.

title: Remembrance
organizer: HUG x The 34 Gallery / Simuka Africa
description: A HUG-curated digital show with The 34 Gallery centered on honoring loved ones lost and the mental-health impact of grief, aligned with UN SDG 3.4 — Faavidel was named a November Open Call winner.

title: FCancer24 Charity Exhibition
organizer: Polygon Alliance x Women In Tech Museum
description: Community charity event minted on Polygon and auctioned via OpenSea with proceeds to FCancer — Faavidel's 1/1 piece Resilience featured among the curated auction artworks.

title: In Control — One Love DAO
description: A One Love DAO billboard takeover plastering curated digital portraits across multiple Times Square screens — Faavidel's work appeared in the group of artists featured during the In Control showcase.

title: NFT.NYC 2025 Community Artist Showcase
description: Faavidel's animation The Tremors Beneath the Thunder was selected for the NFT.NYC 2025 Community Artist Showcase, displayed in the conference's Animation Category at the Marriott Marquis.

title: Oculus: Digital Visions
venue: The Canvas 3.0, Oculus World Trade Center
organizer: One Love Art DAO x Chaz.Art x Burrito DAO
description: An NFT.NYC satellite event exploring what is hidden, imagined, transformed or revealed through digital art — Faavidel's pieces were displayed across the gallery's screen wall at The Canvas 3.0.

title: NFT.NYC Times Square Billboards & Terrace Gallery
venue: Times Square Billboards / NFT.NYC Terrace Art Gallery — Marriott Marquis
description: Faavidel's Collect submission was chosen for a 30-minute Times Square billboard takeover viewed from The Perch at the Marriott Marquis, with the piece also displayed in the NFT.NYC Terrace Art Gallery.

title: One Love Art Summer Billboard Showcase
description: Hand-selected by One Love for a high-visibility Theater District billboard showcase kicking off NFT NYC Week — Faavidel's portrait piece ran on a vertical billboard alongside a dedicated FAAVIDEL artist screen.

title: Returning to Earth — Webbie Open Call
description: Selected for the Webbie Open Call Grand Opening, Faavidel's Returning to Earth ran on the gallery's five 55-inch screens for a month-long show at Dream Canvas Gallery & AI Academy.
